name: Continuing Care Facility Loan Exception

eligibility.description: The lender (or spouse) must be age 65 or older (or 62 under subsection h) and the loan must be made pursuant to a continuing care contract to a qualified facility.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts refundable entrance fees (structured as loans) to qualified continuing care facilities from imputed interest rules.
